title: Hub Source Binding
description: Declares which Hub a satellite vault should sync with. Placed at {satellite-vault}/.sync/hub-source.json. Highest priority over legacy .hub_marker scan.

hubPath.description: Relative path from this satellite vault's root to the Hub vault's root.

hubId.description: Expected Hub identifier. Cross-checked against {hub}/.sync/hub-marker.json's hubId.

notes.description: Optional human notes on why this binding was chosen.
